case_title: MAY Y CHAN VS. J & K ROOTER & REPAIRS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT J & K ROOTER & REPAIRS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, MAY Y RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT J & K ROOTER & REPAIRS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.00, COURT FINDS CONCRETE WORK WHICH PLAINTIFF PAID $5000 WAS DEFECTIVE. COURT FINDS DEFENDANT J&K ROOTER & REPAIRS IS RESPONSIBLE FOR CONCRETE WORK BECAUSE ALL MONEY PAID TO J&K ROOTER & REPAIR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHAN, MAY Y AS TO DEFENDANT J & K ROOTER & REPAIRS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, MAY Y
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT J & K ROOTER & REPAIRS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, MAY Y AS TO DEFENDANT J & K ROOTER & REPAIRS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MAY Y CHAN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI. DEFENDANT J & K ROOTER & REPAIRS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ZI QI TAN OWNER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY SERVICE ISSUES. DEFENDANT HAD TWO WITNESSES: CONCRET CONTRACTOR AND PLUMBER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
